---
title: "compose_affine"
generated: true
description: "Compose a sequence of affines left-to-right."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compose_affine -->
```python
compose_affine(mats: Sequence[Float[Array, '... n np1']]) -> Float[Array, '... n np1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compose_affine -->
Compose a sequence of affines left-to-right.

Given `(A, B, C)` the result is the affine $A\,B\,C$, so the
last transform in the sequence is applied to coordinates first.  Each
affine is promoted to homogeneous square form for the matrix products
and the implied bottom row is dropped from the result.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compose_affine -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mats` | `Sequence[Float[Array, '... n np1']]` | — | — | Non-empty sequence of batched affine matrices in `(..., N, N+1)` form (or square). Batch dimensions must broadcast together. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `n` × `np1`. The composed affine in `(..., N, N+1)` form.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:compose_affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `np1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
